title: GROUP BY ve HAVING
subtitle: Gruplama ve grup bazli filtreleme.
code:
-- Departman bazinda calisan sayisi
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) AS total_employees
FROM employees
GROUP BY department_id;

-- Departman bazinda ortalama maas
SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_salary
FROM employees
GROUP BY department_id;

-- Departman bazinda toplam ve max maas
SELECT department_id,
       SUM(salary) AS total_salary,
       MAX(salary) AS max_salary,
       MIN(salary) AS min_salary
FROM employees
GROUP BY department_id;

-- HAVING: gruplama sonrasi filtreleme
-- (WHERE gruplamadan once, HAVING gruplamadan sonra calisir)
SELECT department_id, AVG(salary) AS avg_salary
FROM employees
GROUP BY department_id
HAVING AVG(salary) > 20000;

-- Birden fazla kolona gore gruplama
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) AS count
FROM employees
WHERE salary > 18000
GROUP BY department_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY count DESC;
